name: Null Power Patron Realm - Vidria
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ヴィードリア
desc: You can reveal 1 "Power Patron" monster in your Extra Deck; banish (face-down) 1 card from your hand, then add to your hand, or Special Summon, 1 monster from your Deck that mentions the revealed monster. You can only use this effect of "Null Power Patron Realm - Vidria" once per turn. Monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK for each banished card. Your opponent cannot activate card effects in the GY while you control "Nerva the Power Patron of Creation", "Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction", and "Junora the Power Patron of Tuning".
eff: You can reveal 1 "Power Patron" monster in your Extra Deck; banish (face-down) 1 card from your hand, then add to your hand, or Special Summon, 1 monster from your Deck that mentions the revealed monster. You can only use this effect of "Null Power Patron Realm - Vidria" once per turn. Monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK for each banished card. Your opponent cannot activate card effects in the GY while you control "Nerva the Power Patron of Creation", "Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction", and "Junora the Power Patron of Tuning".

mentions: Nerva the Power Patron of Creation
Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction
Junora the Power Patron of Tuning
action: Reveals your Extra Deck for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
